steps.title: Identify the defining timeline
steps.content: The passage establishes a clear threshold: no source before 1155 includes Round Table references. Annales Cambriae was composed around 970, well before 1155. Therefore, Annales Cambriae contains no Round Table information.

steps.title: Draw the inference about Malory's sources
steps.content:
A source without Round Table information cannot have provided Malory with Round Table material.

Since Annales Cambriae lacks any Round Table content, Malory could not have used it as a source for Round Table information in Le Morte d'Arthur.

The other choices misrepresent source availability and content similarity; D makes an unsupported accuracy claim.

This matches the correct answer — C is correct.
